name: James

demographics.occupation: Digital marketing manager at a mid-size agency

viewing_behavior.watch_time: Watches on laptop during lunch or desktop at night, sometimes TV cast
viewing_behavior.attention_span: Patient if premise is strong, fast skip if it feels like filler
viewing_behavior.comment_style: Witty one-liners, references to other videos, rates participants

cultural_context.background: Working class family from the North. Got into YouTube culture through gaming, gradually discovered social experiment content. Secretly emotional but performs being detached.
cultural_context.sensitivity_notes: Rolls his eyes at content that feels preachy or overly woke, but is quietly progressive. Values substance over signaling.
cultural_context.language_markers: British slang, understated reactions, uses 'fair enough' and 'mental' a lot
